pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 6 creates PROJECT_DIR at this path
Maven naming convention: pom.xml has artifactId=csv-stats and version=1.0, producing {artifactId}-{version}.jar
setup_task.sh lines 44-89 create App.java with package com.csvstats and class App

pom.xml declares org.apache.commons:commons-csv:1.10.0 dependency; confirmed at https://javadoc.io/doc/org.apache.commons/commons-csv/1.10.0/org/apache/commons/csv/CSVFormat.html that CSVFormat class is in org.apache.commons.csv package

Verified via Maven Central Repository: commons-csv-1.10.0.jar is 54,749 bytes (54.7 KB). A shaded JAR bundling the dependency plus application classes should exceed 50 KB. Threshold is reasonable and conservative.
Maven Central Repository: https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/apache/commons/commons-csv/1.10.0/ lists commons-csv-1.10.0.jar as 54,749 bytes
setup_task.sh creates CSV with real US Census 2020 data; verified at https://www.census.gov/library/stories/state-by-state/california.html that California 2020 population was 39,538,223
setup_task.sh creates CSV with real US Census 2020 data; verified at https://www.census.gov/library/stories/state-by-state/florida.html that Florida 2020 population was 21,538,187

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a Maven project 'csv-stats' with main class com.csvstats.App at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/csv-stats. The pom.xml must be configured with maven-shade-plugin and maven-jar-plugin to produce an executable JAR at target/csv-stats-1.0.jar that bundles Apache Commons CSV 1.10.0 (54,749 bytes). The sample data contains real US Census 2020 population data for 14 states (California: 39,538,223; Florida: 21,538,187). The minimum executable JAR size threshold of 50 KB is conservative but appropriate given the Commons CSV dependency size. Verification checks for JAR existence, minimum size >50KB, Main-Class manifest entry, bundled dependencies at org/apache/commons/csv/, successful execution, and correct statistics output.
